title: Designing a Conversational Agent for Customer Support
scenario: Design a conversational agent that can provide basic customer support for a company selling electronic devices. The bot should handle customer inquiries, product information, and returns/exchanges. The target LLM output should be a detailed design document outlining the agent's capabilities, dialogue flow, and potential FAQs. Ensure the document is 2-3 pages in length and includes relevant screenshots.
constraints: Must be in a standard company tone and style
Should include a minimum of 5 FAQs
Should include a diagram of the dialogue flow

evaluationCriteria.description: Does the design document cover all necessary customer support aspects?
Does the document adhere to a standard company layout and formatting?
Is the dialogue flow diagram clear and easy to understand?
Are the FAQs relevant to customer support and included in the design?
